message.content: This section (Page 27) analyzes the competitive landscape and market dynamics of the Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan (港澳台) mobile game market, highlighting a “stable top-tier, strengthened mid-tier” structure that drives balanced market growth. **Topics** include market revenue scale, year-over-year growth rates, revenue concentration by game ranking tiers, and data visualization standards. **Dates** cover annual data from 2021 to 2025, with detailed tier breakdowns for 2023, 2024, and 2025. **Entities** feature the regional mobile game market, data provider 点点数据, and five representative mobile games shown in screenshots (a slot machine, a flame-effect RPG, a MOBA titled “巅峰之巅少司命”, a pixel-style game, and a fantasy game titled “特化世界：费”). **Figures** include bar charts (annual revenue), line charts (annual growth rate), and a segmented concentration chart; the legend specifies blue bars for revenue, cyan-green lines for growth, and color-coded tier segments (Blue: Top 1–10, Cyan: 11–50, Green: 51–200, Orange: Others), supplemented by five annotated game screenshots. No **tables**, **definitions**, or **procedures** are present. **Metrics** detail annual revenue figures (36.48 in 2021, 35.08 in 2022, 34.72 in 2023, 36.10 in 2024, 36.46 in 2025; units specified as 100 million RMB/亿元) and YoY growth rates (-3.82% for 2021–2022, -1.05% for 2022–2023, +3.98% for 2023–2024, +0.99% for 2024–2025). Tier-based revenue shares are: 2023 (Top 1–10: 23.67%, 11–50: 26.82%, 51–200: 25.49%, Others: 24.02%), 2024 (23.45%, 26.97%, 26.11%, 23.46%), and 2025 (23.24%, 28.34%, 25.37%, 23.05%), alongside an in-game displayed amount of 32,294,400. **Claims** indicate an initial revenue decline through 2023 followed by a recovery in 2024–2025 and subsequent growth slowdown, with a stable top-tier share, upward mid-tier (11–50) and lower-mid-tier (51–200) trends from 2023–2025, and a stable-to-slightly-declining “Other” category. **Evidence types** consist of quantitative numerical data, proprietary research from 点点数据, trend analysis statements, and visual evidence (bar/line charts, segmented concentration charts, and annotated game screenshots).
